title: distichlis spicata var. thalassica
intro: Distichlis spicata var. thalassica, also known as saltwort or sea blite, is a coastal plant species native to the western coast of North America. This succulent plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Distichlis spicata var. thalassica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, making it a valuable resource for coastal communities.
